Changelog

Track updates and improvements to Koryphaios

0.2.0
March 8, 2026Released
  • FeatureAutomatic update checking every 2 hours with manual check option
  • FeatureNew changelog page at koryphaios.com/changelog
  • ImprovementEnhanced update system with codeword verification
  • ImprovementBetter error handling for provider connections
  • Bug FixFixed memory cleanup issues in long-running sessions
0.1.0
February 28, 2026Released
  • FeatureInitial release of Koryphaios
  • FeatureMulti-provider AI agent orchestration (11+ providers)
  • FeatureReal-time WebSocket streaming with SSE fallback
  • FeatureTime Travel (undo/redo) via shadow logger
  • FeatureParallel agent isolation with Git worktrees
  • FeatureMCP integration for extensible tools
  • FeatureTelegram bridge for remote access
  • FeatureDesktop app built with Tauri

Ready to try the latest version?
